reviews.comment:
Hoy fui a llenar el tanque .me dijeron que tienen prohibido emitir factura A cuando abonas con mercado pago y si.pagaba con mercado pago no me hacen el descuento de socio . Realmente un papelon cuiden sus abonados por que ya no es facil asociar.!! Espero que solucionen y no tomen de .... a los asociados

(Translated by Google)
Today I went to fill up my tank. They told me they're prohibited from issuing an A invoice when you pay with Mercado Pago, and even though I paid with Mercado Pago, they won't give me the membership discount. It's really a disgrace. Take care of your members because it's not easy to join anymore! I hope they fix it and don't take advantage of the members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXODZYM1lnEAE
